name: Coconut Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sugar and milk in a saucepan.
2. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add cream of tartar to the mixture.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil and continue boiling for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir until the mixture begins to thicken and turn white.
6. Gradually add the desiccated coconut to the mixture, stirring continuously.
7. Turn the mixture onto a greased square pan.
8. Allow it to cool completely.
9. Slice the cooled mixture into squares.
10. Optionally, pour a drop of red food coloring into half of the mixture to achieve a pink color.
11. Pour this colored mixture over the white coconut mixture.
